/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/test_Integration.dir/test_Integration.cpp.o -o ../../bin/test_Integration  ../../src/stages/libstages.a ../../src/pipeline/libpipeline.a ../../src/core/libcore.a /usr/lib64/libgtest_main.so.1.12.1 ../../src/stages/libstages.a ../../src/pipeline/libpipeline.a ../../src/utils/libutils.a ../../src/profiler/libprofiler.a ../../src/core/libcore.a ../../extern/imgui/libimgui.a /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib64/libgtest.so.1.12.1 -lpthread
